reason: Coordinates GridType domain/presentation split conventions and the grid_type_icons section that this revamp deprecates.
Per-cell replacement Map and grid-type-switch reset semantics live in the Notifier/state shape contract.
Selector widget rewrite + CellOverlay generalization follow widget pattern + a11y rules.
Canvas AspectRatio shifts from 1:1 to cols:rows; layout branches in grid_editor_screen.dart must stay consistent with the height-first contract.
